product.name: Sprinkle Tweed Pants
product.description: Women's cream tweed trousers with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, an adjustable elastic waist, a relaxed baggy leg, and fringed hems.

audience.seed: A woman choosing a visually distinctive pair of trousers for herself and considering fragrance as part of the same getting-ready moment.

positioning.primary_buyer: a woman buying the Sprinkle Tweed Pants for herself
positioning.primary_moment: getting ready for a social plan where one visible statement piece and one personal scent can complete the ritual
positioning.new_opportunity: let one textured trouser carry the visual interest while Auralo becomes the final scent step before leaving
positioning.desired_result: feel intentionally put together through a memorable visible detail and a personal fragrance ritual
positioning.specific_vehicle: Auralo Pheromone Perfume at $29 with the exact Sprinkle Tweed Pants included FREE
positioning.customer_belief: A getting-ready choice feels more complete when the outfit has one memorable visual detail and the wearer has chosen a scent for the moment.
positioning.problem_statement: A basic outfit can feel unfinished, while choosing too many competing pieces can make getting ready feel harder than it needs to be.
positioning.offer_connection: Auralo is the paid personal-scent step; the Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE visible statement reward.
positioning.paid_role: Auralo is the $29 15 ml pheromone-inspired floral-amber perfume applied to pulse points before leaving.
positioning.companion_role: The Sprinkle Tweed Pants are the FREE exact-parity women's statement trousers.
secondary_moments: a weekend city outing built around a simple top and distinctive trousers
an evening plan where she wants her outfit and scent to feel intentional

secrets.title: Let the texture lead the look
secrets.explanation: The cream tweed, multicoloured flecks, braided drawcord, and fringed hems give the trousers their visible identity.

secrets.title: Choose the relaxed shape deliberately
secrets.explanation: The official design uses an adjustable elastic waist and a relaxed baggy fit.

secrets.title: Remove the size uncertainty
secrets.explanation: The current official size and length information gives the buyer a concrete basis for choosing before checkout.

public_language_guardrails: Do not name or compare against the reference seller.
Do not mention the reference seller's price, stock status, alterations, ratings, testimonials, shipping, returns, or war
Do not claim stretch, pockets, lining, warmth, machine washability, attraction, coercion, or a guaranteed reaction.
Do not expose framework names, research labels, production instructions, or the word offer in public copy.
positioning.hero_headline: Get Auralo's $29 Pheromone Perfume and Receive the Sprinkle Tweed Pants FREE.
positioning.hero_subheadline: One personal scent ritual. One cream multicoloured-tweed statement pair. Both in the same getting-ready decision.
positioning.story_intro: What if getting ready started with one piece that makes the look unmistakably yours—and ended with the scent you chose for the moment?
setup_steps: Choose XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, or L-XL for EU 42-44.
Adjust the elastic waist to set the intended relaxed baggy fit.
Dry clean only and keep the delicate tweed away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

free_product_reference.variant_basis: The current official page separately lists Woman / XS-S, Woman / M, and Woman / L-XL; the current supplied comments ask about XS-S and M women's waist sizing; and the supplied reference image shows the women's trouser.

copy_contract.forbidden_disclaimer_sentence: Imagined possibilities, not guaranteed outcomes. Scent perception and individual experiences vary.

research_basis: current public fragrance and statement-trouser category preflight on 2026-07-22

research_topic: Current buyer demand, questions, objections, styling moments, and purchase signals for Vanilla Sprinkles-style women's multicoloured tweed baggy trousers; current perfume desire, scent-language, application, objections, and purchase moments; and evidence of a shared getting-ready moment between a statement trouser and personal fragrance.

creative_direction.visual_style: Premium direct-response editorial photography with believable phone-camera texture and accurate product proportions.
creative_direction.buyer_world: Everyday environments in the target market that match the campaign's locked use moments.
creative_direction.cast_rule: Use 24 visibly distinct adults who fit the primary buyer; vary apparent age, skin tone, facial features, hair, wardrobe, camera, and lighting.

research_policy.rule: Intake seeds may shape current queries but cannot become evidence. Product facts must map to fresh official-reference capture, and buyer claims must come from this run's retrieval.

preview.footer_disclosure: Promotional lifestyle scenes are creative representations. Product details and purchase terms appear on this page.
